---
title: "project cleaned data"
author: "Bero"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

## R Markdown


```{r}
movies <- read_csv("top-500-movies.csv")

## selecting only the relevant columns, 
## filtering the one without worldwide_gross, 
## sorting the production cost from low to high

cleaned_movies <- movies %>% select(title,production_cost,worldwide_gross) %>% 
  filter(!worldwide_gross==0) %>%
  arrange(production_cost) %>%
  mutate(production_cost_millions = production_cost/1e6, worldwide_gross_millions=worldwide_gross/1e6) %>% 
  select(-production_cost, -worldwide_gross) %>%
  relocate(production_cost_millions, .before=worldwide_gross_millions)
```
